basic_details.job_title: RVNL General Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Rail Vikas Nigam Limited (RVNL) has published the General Manager (Business Development) Notification 2026 on 28 April 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 General Manager (Business Development) position. Candidates within the age range of up to 57 years and holding a full-time Bachelor’s Degree in Civil Engineering with a minimum of 20 years of executive experience in business development and project execution are eligible to apply via email from 28 April 2026 to 27 May 2026. Candidates can easily access the notification PDF and apply link below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 57 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India guidelines.

qualification.education_qualification: Full-time Bachelor’s Degree in Civil Engineering from a recognized University/Institution, Minimum 20 years executive experience in Business Development, Project planning and procurement, Bid management, project execution in civil infrastructure projects
qualification.details: Full-time Bachelor’s Degree in Civil Engineering from a recognized University/Institution. Minimum 20 years of executive experience in Business Development, Project planning and procurement, Bid management, project execution in civil infrastructure projects.

selection_process: Screening / shortlisting of applications by Scrutiny Committee Personal Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for RVNL General Manager (Business Development) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 27-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the RVNL General Manager (Business Development) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 27th May 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a full-time Bachelor’s Degree in Civil Engineering from a recognized University or Institution to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. How many years of experience are needed for the General Manager (Business Development) role?
faq.answer: A minimum of 20 years of executive experience is required. This experience should be in areas such as Business Development, Project planning, procurement, and bid management in civil infrastructure projects.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 57 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the guidelines set by the Government of India.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the General Manager (Business Development) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary in the range of Rs. ₹1,20,000 to ₹2,80,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for this position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves two main stages: screening/shortlisting of applications by a Scrutiny Committee, followed by a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is only one vacancy for the post of General Manager (Business Development) in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. In which city and state is this job located?
faq.answer: The job is located in New Delhi, Delhi.

faq.question: Q10. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Candidates need to send their resume and required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.
